programmes.show_description: How news bulletins used to look. The GREAT! network takes you back in time, remembering stories from this week back then.

programmes.show_name: Disaster Zone: Volcano In New York
programmes.show_description: Fiery drama with Michael Ironside. Things heat up when an underground experiment blows the lid off Manhattan - literally. With lava in the streets, a construction crew must plug the meltdown. (2006)

Tombstone's low water supply and inadequate fire fighting equipment leads RC Tuttle to start a campaign to encourage residents to move to Benson.

Trainee agent Tara King joins Steed as they search for a traitor within the organisation. Mrs. Peel leaves the team when her missing husband reappears. Stars Patrick Macnee and Linda Thorson.
A clue found on a dead agent leads Steed and King to pose as a married couple to investigate the Alpha Academy for intelligent children. But will their findings prove to be alien to them?
John Cannon needs cattle from Mexican ranchers for his Army beef contract but finds the frightened men are being forced to sell at cheap prices to a ruthless cattle buyer.

Two recently released convicts scheme to rob a rich mine owner.
John Cannon drives cold seekers from an abandoned mine on his land, and they retaliate by plotting to kill the Cannons.
The team are tasked with investigating the mysterious disappearance of Soviet and Canadian agents. They soon unearth a criminal plot which could lead to the destabilisation of Canada.
Steed aids Scotland Yard colleague, Sir Arthur Doyle, with a case that has provided an abundance of clues. Can they determine whether their suspect is sloppy or being framed for murder?
All clues point to a notorious foreign agent when members of the secret service are murdered. The only problem is that Steed killed the prime suspect five years ago.
Sci-fi thriller with Sylvester Stallone. In a crime-ridden future, law enforcer Judge Dredd, is framed for murder. Fighting to clear his name, he uncovers a dark conspiracy. (1995)
